text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 8 

ANES_EVENTS 

LABEL: Anesthesia Events 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of events for Part B anesthesia services (ANES) for a given year. An event is 
defined as each line item that contains the relevant service. 

ANES claim lines are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier data file. 
ANES claims are defined as those with a line BETOS
